name: Small Startup Team
description: A complete startup team with CEO, product manager, 2 engineers, QA engineer, and release engineer. Includes daily standups, weekly status reporting, and PR review workflows.
author: ClawMax Team

communities.name: Engineering Team
communities.description: Software development, QA, and release management

groups.name: All Hands
groups.description: Company-wide group for announcements and coordination

workflows.name: Daily Standup
workflows.content:
# Daily Standup Workflow

Please provide your standup update covering:

### 1. Yesterday's Accomplishments
- What did you complete yesterday?

### 2. Today's Plans  
- What are your top priorities for today?

### 3. Blockers
- Are you blocked on anything?

workflows.name: Weekly Status Report
workflows.content:
# Weekly Status Report

Please provide your weekly status:

### 1. Key Accomplishments This Week
- Major wins and completed work

### 2. Next Week's Priorities
- Planned focus areas

### 3. Risks & Concerns
- Potential issues or blockers

workflows.name: PR Review
workflows.description: Review open pull requests for code quality and test coverage
workflows.content:
# PR Review Workflow

## Tasks
1. Check for open pull requests on the repository
2. Review code changes for quality and correctness
3. Verify tests pass and coverage is adequate
4. Check for TypeScript errors and style issues
5. Provide feedback or approve the PR

## Output
- GitHub review comment (approve or request changes)
- Test results summary
